## Description
Set reminders to reconsider purchases after a cooling-off period (e.g., 24h, 1 week).

## Benefits
- Reduce impulsive purchases
- Give time for thoughtful decisions
- Implement "sleep on it" strategy

## Implementation Tasks
- [ ] Add reminder system to purchases
- [ ] Email/push notifications
- [ ] Reminder management UI

- See IDEAS.md section: Enhanced Features
